message:
fix(security): redact secrets from tool-result content before DB insert (#112)

Claude Code tool-result messages can contain API keys, tokens, passwords,
and other secrets in both message content and extra_json fields.  These
were persisted unredacted into the cass database.

Add ingestion-time redaction in map_to_internal() that applies regex-based
pattern matching for common secret formats (AWS keys, GitHub PATs, OpenAI/
Anthropic keys, Bearer tokens, JWTs, private keys, DB URLs, Slack/Stripe
tokens, generic key=value assignments) and replaces matches with [REDACTED].

Redaction can be disabled via CASS_REDACT_SECRETS=0 for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
